news.summary: Hong Kong police will impose a HK$500 (US$63) cash limit on construction workers and conduct searches using metal detectors under new security measures at Wang Fuk Court, after three labourers were arrested on suspicion of stealing jewellery while carrying out structural reinforcement work at the bl

news.headline: 2 more suspects arrested over HK$10 million knifepoint robbery in Hong Kong
news.summary:
Hong Kong police have arrested two more suspects in connection with a HK$10 million (US$1.28 million) knifepoint robbery in Sheung Wan last week.

news.headline: Iran war threatens prolonged impact on energy markets as oil prices rise
news.summary: The conflict has already led to the suspension of almost a fifth of global crude oil and natural gas supply.

news.headline: Iran strikes five Gulf states: Arab league convene emergency session
news.summary:
On Saturday, Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian surprised many observers by apologizing for strikes on neighboring countries and saying the conflict should be resolved diplomatically. But since then, strikes from Iran have continued in the Gulf.

news.headline: Second Pakistani killed in UAE due to falling debris from aerial interception amid ongoing Iran-US-Israel war
news.summary:
<p>A Pakistani driver was killed when “debris from an aerial interception” fell onto a vehicle in Dubai’s Al Barsha area late on Saturday night, according to Dubai Media Office.</p>

news.headline: Black smoke plunges Tehran into darkness after Israeli strikes on oil depots
news.summary: The Iranian Red Crescent on Sunday warned Tehran residents to take extra precautions to avoid noxious fumes stemming from a fire that broke out after Israel struck multiple oil storage depots, cloaking the Iranian capital in thick black smoke that blocked out the sun.

news.headline: Russell and Mercedes win F1’s Australian Grand Prix after Piastri crash
news.summary: Mercedes finish one-two on the podium with Ferrari's Leclerc third as Norris finishes fifth in Melbourne.
